(2) For these students, the interest penalty for delayed payments will not be applied. (3) Students with donor funding who resign after the deadline for adding and dropping of courses will be liable to repay the total amount of tuition and registration fees that have been charged to the donor. (4) Graduating students who are not able to complete financial clearance before graduation, due to outstanding financial obligations caused by the delay in the transmission of payment by their donors, are allowed to graduate and join the graduation ceremony if there is an endorsement from the Director of the concerned Offices based on the confirmation from the donor that payment will be transmitted to AIT soon. (5) Transcripts and Degree Certificates of affected graduating students will be withheld by Registry.
